name: Merge Bullet Army Game
description: Run and Stack the bullets shoot them all , new Bullet and Gun Experience with stack. Throughout each level, players encounter various hurdles and adversaries that stand in their path. Utilize your stocked bullets wisely to overcome these obstacles, shooting barrels, and collecting more ammunition to replenish your magazines. As the level progresses, the challenge intensifies, requiring quick reflexes and precise aim to succeed. Use your weapons and guns strategically, saving bullets for crucial moments and unleashing them with precision to defeat enemies and clear the path to victory.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
